title: stelis franciscana
intro: Stelis franciscana, also known as the "Franciscan Stelis", is a type of orchid species native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, derived from its flowers, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Stelis franciscana include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Stelis franciscana can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
